/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/command/command_ingress_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/command/cloud_receiver_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/data/mcu_serial_reader_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/data/publish_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/input_layer_node.dir/src/data/serial_port.cpp.o -o input_layer_node  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ogmen/oro_base/oro_base_input_layer/build/radxa_drivers -lzmq radxa_drivers/libradxa_drivers.so
